title: How a Godly Man Picks Up Weight No One Assigned Him
caption:
Nobody voted him in. He just moved first.

Leadership doesn't start with a title. It starts with a man who notices the mess nobody's claimed and picks it up before anyone asks. The dish in the sink. The silence after somebody messes up. The task with no name on it.

Christ washed feet the night before He died. Nobody handed Him a job description first.

Start small. Find the thing nobody's named today, and do it without mentioning it.

#faith #leadership #christianman #godlyman #service #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
